heroes.name: Sir Garran, the Ironvow
heroes.team_flavor: radiant: a sworn knight-captain clad in cobalt plate, banner of the Ironvow order

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.desc: Charge the buckler into a target, dealing physical damage and STUNNING. Garran's signature lockdown — short range, reliable hard stun.

abilities.name: Oathguard
abilities.desc: Raises an oath-bound aegis: gains bonus armor and a flat SHIELD that absorbs damage. While active, melee attackers take reflected physical damage.

abilities.name: Banner of Resolve
abilities.desc: Passive aura. Garran and nearby allied heroes gain bonus move speed and HP regen. Scales the whole team's sticking power in fights.

abilities.name: Unbreaking Vow
abilities.desc: Ultimate: slams the ground, TAUNTING all enemies in the area to attack Garran for the duration while he gains massive damage reduction. Initiation + peel teamfight ult.

heroes.playstyle: Frontline initiator. Walk in, R to taunt the enemy core, Q-stun the priority target, W to survive the focus while allies clean up. Low cooldowns, high uptime, forgiving for new players — the recommended starter hero vs bots.

heroes.name: Vesper, the Duskblade
heroes.team_flavor: radiant: a quick light-footed squire turned blade-dancer, blue sash flickering as she blinks between foes

abilities.name: Shadowstep
abilities.desc: Blink a fixed distance toward the cursor, passing over units and terrain. Next attack within the window strikes for bonus physical damage. Core mobility + gap-close/escape.

abilities.name: Fanned Daggers
abilities.desc: Throws a spread of three daggers in a cone; each deals physical damage and applies a brief SLOW. Wave-clear and harass at the edge of her range.

abilities.name: Bloodthirst
abilities.desc: Passive carry scaling: attacks LIFESTEAL a percent of damage and grant a stacking attack-speed buff that decays out of combat. Rewards staying on a target.

abilities.name: Death Waltz
abilities.desc: Ultimate: lock onto a hero and become briefly untargetable while striking them several times, finishing with a backstab CRIT. Pure single-target assassination burst.

heroes.playstyle: Snowball assassin carry. Last-hit early, use Q to dodge ganks, fan daggers to push, then dive squishies with R. High skill ceiling and high reward — punishes overextended bots hard.

heroes.name: Aelwyn Stormcaller
heroes.team_flavor: radiant: an azure-cloaked longbow ranger who calls down storm-touched arrows from the treeline

abilities.name: Piercing Shot
abilities.desc: Fires a long-range arrow that pierces through all units in a line, dealing physical damage that falls off slightly per target hit. Poke and wave-pierce.

abilities.name: Hunter's Mark
abilities.desc: Marks a hero: the target takes amplified attack damage and is REVEALED. Aelwyn gains bonus attack speed against the marked target. Sets up the kill.

abilities.name: Windfoot
abilities.desc: Quick self buff: gains a burst of move speed and her next few attacks fire faster with mini-SLOW on hit, letting her kite. Active kiting tool for an immobile ranged carry.

abilities.name: Storm Volley
abilities.desc: Ultimate CHANNEL: rains storm arrows on a target area over several seconds, ticking AoE physical damage and slowing. Breaking channel ends it. Zoning + teamfight + siege damage.

heroes.playstyle: Position-and-poke ranged carry. Farm safely with Q, mark the enemy carry, kite with E, and drop Storm Volley to win fights or break towers. Rewards good spacing; squishy if caught.

heroes.name: Grix the Emberhex
heroes.team_flavor: dire: a cackling goblin firebrand who hurls living flame, scorched-green skin lit by his own torch

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.desc: Lobs a fireball that explodes on impact, dealing magic damage in an area. Grix's bread-and-butter nuke and wave-clear. Fast cooldown.

abilities.name: Cinder Trail
abilities.desc: Ignites a patch of ground that burns for several seconds, dealing damage-over-time and applying a stacking BURN that slows. Zoning and chip nuke.

abilities.name: Flashfire
abilities.desc: Self-immolation buff: surrounds Grix in flame, damaging adjacent enemies each second and granting spell amplification. Short-range bruiser-mage option in melee scraps.

abilities.name: Conflagration
abilities.desc: Ultimate AoE NUKE: a massive delayed firestorm erupts at the target point, dealing huge magic damage and igniting all enemies hit (DoT). Teamfight wombo and big burst.

heroes.playstyle: Burst caster. Spam Fireball to clear and poke, zone with Cinder Trail, and detonate Conflagration on grouped enemies for a teamfight swing. Mana-hungry; vulnerable between cooldowns.

heroes.name: Fizzle Boomtinker
heroes.team_flavor: dire: a manic goblin demolitions sapper strapped with TNT, leaving a trail of mischief and craters

abilities.name: Lob Dynamite
abilities.desc: Throws a stick of dynamite that explodes for magic damage in an area; deals BONUS damage to buildings. Primary harass and tower-chunking tool.

abilities.name: Proximity Mines
abilities.desc: Plants a hidden mine that arms after a delay and detonates when an enemy steps near, dealing burst magic damage and a brief SLOW. Up to several mines persist. Map control + ambush.

abilities.name: Powder Keg
abilities.desc: Straps on extra powder: next several attacks gain splash AoE and a chance to knock back. Passive base bonus building damage on attacks. Sustained siege + clear.

abilities.name: Demolition Run
abilities.desc: Ultimate: sprints forward with a lit megabomb (move-speed surge, unstoppable), then SLAMS it down for massive AoE magic damage and a STUN, with huge bonus damage to structures. Dive-and-detonate finisher / base-race tool.

heroes.playstyle: Splitpush / siege specialist with a summon kit. Mine chokepoints, Q+E to shred towers fast, and use Demolition Run to dive a fight or race the enemy ancient. Excellent for ending the match on time.

heroes.name: Old Bramblecask
heroes.team_flavor: dire: a rotund goblin brew-shaman who rolls a healing keg into battle, splashing restorative ale and bitter hexes

abilities.name: Restoring Brew
abilities.desc: Splashes ale on an allied hero, instantly HEALING and granting a short regen-over-time. Can target self. Bramblecask's primary save.

abilities.name: Hex Bottle
abilities.desc: Hurls a bottle that shatters in an area, SILENCING and SLOWING enemies caught and dealing minor magic damage. Disable + setup for the team.

abilities.name: Warding Keg
abilities.desc: Pops the keg to grant himself and nearby allies a SHIELD plus bonus armor for a few seconds. Frontline-saving panic button in an aura.

abilities.name: Last Call
abilities.desc: Ultimate CHANNEL: pours out the great cask, creating a healing zone that rapidly restores allied HP and mana and cleanses slows each tick for its duration. Sustains the whole team through a teamfight or siege.

heroes.playstyle: Pure support enabler. Keep the carry alive with Brew, lock targets with Hex Bottle, blanket the team in shields, and channel Last Call to out-sustain pushes. The ideal ally to pair with a bot carry — or for a human to babysit a strong AI core.

melee.name: Footman Creep (Pawn / Goblin Grunt)
melee.note: hpScalesPerWave +6hp & +0.5dmg every 60s to push the game toward an end

ranged.name: Archer Creep (Archer / Goblin TNT)
ranged.note: low hp, high value last-hit; same hpScalesPerWave rule as melee

siege.name: Battering Keg (Barrel siege)
siege.note: deals +150% damage to towers/ancient, only takes 40% of hero/creep damage; arrives every 5th wave to accelerate tower kills and shorten match length

towers.aggro: Prioritizes: enemy hero attacking an allied hero in range > nearest enemy creep > nearest enemy hero. Switches to a hero immediately if that hero attacks an allied hero within range. Ramps damage +25% per consecutive hit on the same target (resets on switch).
towers.note: one per lane, 3 lanes; backdoor-protected: regenerates 30hp/s when no enemy creeps are nearby

towers.aggro: Same priority rules as T1. Slightly faster attack and higher base damage. +25% ramp per consecutive hit.
towers.note: guards the entrance to the base; falls only after T1 in its lane is destroyed (lane-gated)

towers.aggro: Same priority rules. Highest damage lane tower. +25% ramp per consecutive hit. Two T3 towers guard the ancient.
towers.note: the two T3 towers (guarding the ancient) must both fall before the ancient becomes attackable

towers.aggro: The Ancient's own guardian tower (see ancient.guardianTowerNote). Attacks nearest enemy; fast attack speed, lower hp; exists purely to slow the final dive.
towers.note: this is the ancient guardian referenced in ancient; only active once both T3 towers are down

ancient.winConditionNote: Destroy the enemy Ancient (Castle_Blue for radiant / Goblin_House or Castle_Red for dire) to win the match. The ancient itself does NOT attack — it is a pure objective. It only becomes attackable after BOTH T3 towers in front of it are destroyed.
ancient.guardianTowerNote: One 'base' tier guardian tower (1100hp, 70dmg, fast 1.2 attackSpeed) sits beside the ancient and activates only after the two T3 towers fall — it cannot be skipped and must be killed or tanked to free-hit the ancient. The ancient regenerates 25hp/s while no enemy creeps are within 700px, so it must be sieged with a creep wave present (no solo-hero backdoor).
ancient.note: Total objective HP path to win (one lane): T1 1400 + T2 1900 + T3 2300 + T3 2300 + guardian 1100 + ancient 3200. With Boomtinker building bonuses and siege creeps this falls in ~8-14 min.

economy.creepLastHitGold: see creeps.goldBounty per type (melee 28-40, ranged 34-46, siege 60-75); only the last hit awards gold
economy.denyNote: Allied creeps below 50% hp can be denied (last-hit your own creep) to grant the enemy ZERO gold and only 50% XP. Denying a creep gives the denier no gold but the standard XP share. Heroes cannot be denied.
economy.heroKillStreakNote: Bounty scales with the victim's net worth and kill streak: base 200 + 12 per victim level + streak bonus (+40 per kill on the streak, capped +280 at a 7-kill 'godlike' streak). Ending an enemy's streak (3+) grants a +75 'shutdown' bonus. Dying resets your own streak to 0.
economy.assistGold: 60% of the post-streak bounty, split evenly among all assisting heroes within the assist radius who damaged the victim in the last 15s
economy.buybackNote: While dead, spend gold to instantly respawn: cost = 120 + 6*heroLevel + 0.10*currentGold. 60s cooldown, and buyback reduced gold income (-25%) for 12s after. Lets a defender break a game-ending push — important for the human vs an organized bot dive.
economy.note: Bots are given a flat +0.4 gold/sec handicap reduction on Easy and parity on Normal so a solo human + bot allies can out-econ a bot enemy team within the target match length.

items.name: Boots of the March
items.desc: Early movement item, nearly always the first buy. Flat move speed to get to lane, dodge ganks, and rotate.
items.iconHint: Tiny Swords UI/Icons Regular_01 boot/leather icon, or generate a simple winged-boot pixel icon

items.name: Ringmail Vest
items.desc: Cheap survivability for tanks/offlaners. Flat armor and a little hp regen to win the lane.
items.iconHint: generate a chainmail-vest pixel icon; or reuse a Tiny Swords shield UI icon

items.name: Whetstone Blade
items.desc: Core damage component for carries. Pure attack damage; cheap and efficient.
items.iconHint: Tiny Swords UI Elements/Swords icon recolored, or generate a sharpened sword pixel icon

items.name: Huntsman's Quiver
items.desc: Attack speed + a touch of damage for right-click carries (Vesper, Aelwyn). Powers up Bloodthirst stacks and DPS.

items.name: Tome of Embers
items.desc: Caster core: bonus mana, mana regen, and flat spell amplification for nukers/supports.
items.iconHint: generate a glowing spellbook pixel icon

items.name: Bulwark Plate
items.desc: Big tank item. Large hp pool plus armor; turns Garran or Bramblecask into a wall.
items.iconHint: generate a heavy breastplate pixel icon; or reuse Tiny Swords shield UI

items.name: Vampiric Fang
items.desc: Damage + lifesteal carry item. Sustains right-clickers through fights and farm; stacks with Vesper's Bloodthirst.
items.iconHint: generate a dripping fang pixel icon

items.name: Sash of Haste
items.desc: Utility item with a chase/escape active. Decent move speed and hp; the active is a short untargetable-by-towers sprint.
items.active: Haste: +120 move speed for 3.5s and ignore unit collision. 30s cooldown.
items.iconHint: generate a flowing sash/cloak pixel icon

items.name: Aegis Pendant
items.desc: Defensive active item that saves you from burst. Modest hp/armor and an on-demand barrier.
items.active: Barrier: shields 350 damage for 5s and cleanses slows. 45s cooldown.
items.iconHint: generate a radiant amulet/pendant pixel icon

items.name: Scepter of Ruin
items.desc: Late-game power spike. Big mixed stats and an active blink, the premier finisher item for any hero (especially Grix and Vesper to reposition for a kill).
items.active: Blink: teleport up to 600px toward cursor. 14s cooldown, goes on a longer 3s cooldown if you took hero damage recently.
items.iconHint: generate an ornate glowing scepter pixel icon

globals.worldUnitsNote: 1 tile = 64px (Tiny Swords terrain tile). All ranges/radii in this design are in PIXELS. Map is a 3-lane diamond roughly 96x96 tiles (~6144x6144px); lanes ~9 tiles wide; a thin river/jungle gap between lanes. Heroes render ~96-128px tall (192px source frame scaled ~0.5-0.66).
globals.attackArmorFormula: Damage taken multiplier = 1 - (0.06*armor)/(1 + 0.06*armor). So 10 armor ~= 37.5% reduction, 20 armor ~= 54.5%. Negative armor amplifies symmetrically. Magic damage ignores armor and is reduced by a flat 25% baseMagicResist on heroes (0% on creeps/buildings). Attacks are 'physical' unless an ability states 'magic'.
globals.xpCurveNote: Array is cumulative XP required to REACH each level index (index 0 = level 1 start at 0xp). 16 entries = max level 16. Per-level deltas: 240,360,480,600,720,840,960,1080,1200,1320,1440,1560,1680,1800,1920.
globals.respawnTimeFormula: respawnSec = 6 + 4*heroLevel, capped at 70s. (lvl1 ~10s, lvl8 ~38s, lvl16 70s.) Buyback bypasses this (see economy.buybackNote). Deaths get costlier as the game goes long, snowballing toward an ending.
globals.dayNightNote: 240s day/night cycle purely cosmetic + a small night vision reduction (-150px sight) for flavor; does not gate objectives.
globals.matchPacingNote: Tuned for 8-14 min vs bots: creeps & ancient regen unless sieged with a wave (no backdoor), siege creeps every 5th wave, escalating respawn timers, and Boomtinker/siege building bonuses all push toward a decisive end. First objective (T1) typically dies ~3-5 min; ancient ~8-14 min.
globals.abilityLevelingNote: 1 ability point per hero level. Q/W/E max at rank 4 (levels available 1,3,5,7); ultimate R has 3 ranks (available at hero levels 6, 11, 16). Standard MOBA leveling.
globals.teamSizeNote: Designed for 1 human + bots up to 5v5. Minimum fun config is 1 human + 1 bot ally (recommend Garran or a carry) vs 2 bots. Bots fill all empty hero slots and are host-driven.
